query: what is HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund?

data.answer:
HDFC ELSS Tax Saver Fund (Direct Plan Growth) is an ELSS category fund that seeks to generate capital appreciation / income from a portfolio, comprising predominantly of equity & equity related instruments.. The fund's benchmark is the NIFTY 500 Total Return Index.. Source: https://groww..

---
